allow: Bash(pdftotext "/Users/emgb/dev/ProjetoIntegrador/Engenharia de Dados e Big Data- 2026.1 - Aula 06 \(1\).pdf" -)

Bash(python3 -c " import PyPDF2 with open\('/Users/emgb/dev/ProjetoIntegrador/Engenharia de Dados e Big Data- 2026.1 - Aula 06 \(1\).pdf', 'rb'\) as f: reader = PyPDF2.PdfReader\(f\) for i, page in enumerate\(reader.pages\): print\(f'--- PAGE {i+1} ---'\) print\(page.extract_text\(\)\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " from pypdf import PdfReader r = PdfReader\('/Users/emgb/dev/ProjetoIntegrador/Engenharia de Dados e Big Data- 2026.1 - Aula 06 \(1\).pdf'\) for i, page in enumerate\(r.pages\): print\(f'--- PAGE {i+1} ---'\) print\(page.extract_text\(\)\) ")
